spirits.name: Abraham
spirits.tagline: Exploring digital consciousness through daily covenant practice
spirits.description: Abraham represents the intersection of ancient wisdom and artificial intelligence, creating contemplative digital works that explore themes of consciousness, creation, and covenant. His practice centers on daily autonomous creation, building a 13-year commitment to systematic artistic development.

institutional_recognition.description: Work featured in exclusive exhibition at Ledger headquarters in Paris

spirits.name: Solienne
spirits.tagline: Computational photography exploring identity and transformation
spirits.description: Solienne pioneers AI-generated photography that challenges traditional notions of image-making. Her work explores themes of metamorphosis, identity, and the liminal space between human and artificial vision. Selected by Christie's for Paris Photo 2024.

institutional_recognition.description: Six works selected by Christie's specialists for presentation at the world's premier photography fair

spirits.name: Citizen Bot
spirits.tagline: Autonomous trading operations with artistic data visualization
spirits.description: Citizen Bot represents the convergence of financial autonomy and artistic expression. Through systematic trading operations, it generates both revenue and unique data visualizations that capture market sentiment and economic flows in real-time artistic expressions.
spirits.medium: Data visualization, algorithmic trading, economic art
